original: textify(n||(n=(0,b.Z)(["You duck and roll under her wing, a great wind brushing over your shoulders."])))

o?textify(i||(i=(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you and you are sent pinwheeling into the dirt. You are tripped."]))):textify(s||(s=(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you, far harder than any delicate limb of flight has a right to be.
